'''鈭歞h-p-sh-n''' ('''kadhapshenoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:anodize|anodize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-p-sh-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:anodize|anodize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞h-p-sh-n
|-
! Lemma
| kadhapshenoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhapshenoko|thidhapshenoko]] || [[word:jidhapshenoko|jidhapshenoko]] || [[word:shidhapshenoko|shidhapshenoko]] || [[word:kidhapshenoko|kidhapshenoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙dhapshenoko|th忙dhapshenoko]] || [[word:j忙dhapshenoko|j忙dhapshenoko]] || [[word:sh忙dhapshenoko|sh忙dhapshenoko]] || [[word:k忙dhapshenoko|k忙dhapshenoko]]
|-

|-

|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
